ast.name: log
ast.source: in handlebars-helpers v1.0.0, please use the {{match}}
ast.target: 在 handlebars-helpers v1.0.0 中，请使用 {{match}}

ast.name: log
ast.source: helper instead.
ast.target: 辅助函数代替。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose JSON/CSV data file to import, or paste text into the text box
ast.target: 选择要导入的 JSON/CSV 数据文件，或将文本粘贴到文本框中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the URL location of the JSON data
ast.target: 指定 JSON 数据的 URL 位置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select this option if the JSON data might contain more than one object (the selected data is split into separate objects by looking for '}s+{' as the separator
ast.target: 如果 JSON 数据可能包含多个对象，请选择此选项（通过查找 '}s+{' 作为分隔符将选定数据拆分为单独的对象）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optionally select a file containing some Handlebars Helpers functions
ast.target: 可选择包含一些 Handlebars 辅助函数的文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optionally select a file which controls multiple parses of the data
ast.target: 可选择控制数据多次解析的文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The field containing the array of data (leave blank to use entire file) [in batch file 'fieldName']
ast.target: 包含数据数组的字段（留空则使用整个文件）[在批处理文件中为 'fieldName']

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select this option if 'Field containing the data' is a single object and a separate note should be created for each field of that object.
ast.target: 如果“包含数据的字段”是单个对象，并且应为该对象的每个字段创建单独的笔记，请选择此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Field in each row of the JSON/CSV data to be used for the note name [in batch file 'noteName']
ast.target: JSON/CSV 数据每行中用于笔记名称的字段 [在批处理文件中为 'noteName']

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When checked, if a second or subsequent Note has the same name as a Note created during this import, then the second or subsequent note will have a numeric identifier added to the end of the Note Name to make it unique
ast.target: 如果选中，当第二个或后续笔记与本次导入期间创建的笔记同名时，将在笔记名称末尾添加数字标识符以使其唯一。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional prefix/suffix to be added either side of the value from the above Note name field [in batch file 'namePrefix', 'nameSuffix']
ast.target: 可选的前缀/后缀，将添加到上述笔记名称字段值的两侧 [在批处理文件中为 'namePrefix', 'nameSuffix']

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow / in the Note name field to be used to create folders (when not selected / will be replaced by _ as part of note name)
ast.target: 允许笔记名称字段中的 / 用于创建文件夹（未选中时，/ 将作为笔记名称的一部分被替换为 _）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: REPLACE: Replace the existing note with the newly generated note; APPEND: Append the new note contents to the end of the existing note; KEEP: Leave the original note untouched and generate a warning
ast.target: REPLACE：用新生成的笔记替换现有笔记；APPEND：将新笔记内容附加到现有笔记末尾；KEEP：保持原始笔记不变并生成警告

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the folder in your Obsidian Vault, which will be created if required [in batch file, 'folderName']
ast.target: Obsidian 库中文件夹的名称，如果需要将创建该文件夹 [在批处理文件中为 'folderName']

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Press to start the Import Process
ast.target: 按下以开始导入过程

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Choose JSON/CSV File
ast.target: 选择 JSON/CSV 文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Specify URL to JSON data
ast.target: 指定 JSON 数据的 URL

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Data contains multiple JSON objects
ast.target: 数据包含多个 JSON 对象

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Choose TEMPLATE File
ast.target: 选择模板文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Choose HELPERS File
ast.target: 选择辅助函数文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Choose BATCH File
ast.target: 选择批处理文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Field containing the data
ast.target: 包含数据的字段

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Each subfield is a separate note
ast.target: 每个子字段是一个单独的笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Field to use as Note name
ast.target: 用作笔记名称的字段

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add suffix on duplicate Note Names
ast.target: 在重复的笔记名称上添加后缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Note name prefix/suffix
ast.target: 笔记名称前缀/后缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Allow paths in Note name
ast.target: 允许笔记名称中包含路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: How to handle existing Notes
ast.target: 如何处理已存在的笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Name of Destination Folder in Vault
ast.target: 保险库中目标文件夹的名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Import
ast.target: 导入

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Duplicate headers found and renamed.
ast.target: 发现并重命名了重复的标题。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 从URL获取数据失败

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 未选择JSON文件

ast.target: 一个错误

ast.name: message
ast.source: Quoted field unterminated
ast.target: 引号字段未终止

ast.name: message
ast.source: Trailing quote on quoted field is malformed
ast.target: 引号字段末尾的引号格式错误

ast.source: Import JSON/CSV file
